title: Cupcake Molds, Reusable Silicone Baking Cases Muffin Molds, 24 Count (Pack of 1)
features: FDA Certified Silicone: the package includes 24 colorful molds for mini muffins. Size:75ml per mold, top diameter 7cm, bottom diameter 4.5cm.
Easy to use: These molds are flexible and fit perfectly to your cupcake mold, or they can also be placed on simple flat pans. Once the cupcakes are taken out, just take them out.

Other applications: these cute molds can also be used to store other foods such as vegetables, snacks and fruits for your kids. Use them to make a nutritious meal and avoid junk food. Even the pickiest children will love eating healthy food from these colourful and fun little shapes.
